content.full_text:
VOLUNTEERS FOR A VALLEY CENTER HIGH SCHOOL
A Nonprofit Public Benefit Corporation
27930 Valley Center Rd.
Valley Center, CA 92082
(619) 749-3471

May 2, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Commission:

This letter is to register our intent as a 501(c)(3)
tax-exempt nonprofit corporation to engage, to an
insubstantial degree, in lobbying efforts to influence
the public's attitude regarding the passage of Proposition
152 on the California June 1992 ballot, passage of the
Valley Center Union School District bond measure in
November, 1992, and passage of the Escondido Union High
School District's bond measure for funds to build a
Valley Center High School, the date of which election
will be held is as yet determined. Enclosed please find
our statement of purpose as defined in our Articles of
Incorporation as well as Form 5768 which we have filed
with the IRS.

Please advise as to what formal registration requirements
apply, if any, and reporting requirements of the California
Fair Political Practices Commission. A copy of the
Information Manual for Lobbying Disclosure Provisions of
the Political Reform Act would be appreciated.

Sincerely,

Carolyn Pateman
Director

Enclosures
